title: Junior Business Development Manager at Man Infraconstruction

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Man Infraconstruction
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Man Infraconstruction. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
